chapter_goal: Make Chapter 1 distance ideas inspectable through finite data, quotient diagrams, example comparisons, topology/Lipschitz/completeness/compactness models, and Hausdorff covering weights.

library_routing.concept: metric axioms, infinite metrics, semi-metric quotient
library_routing.why: finite matrices and fiber diagrams expose exact equivalence relations
distance formulas and unit balls are legible as 2D comparison panels
a slider varies p while the unit ball deforms
balls, slopes, Cauchy tails, and epsilon nets are low-dimensional and annotated
covering weights by scale make the critical exponent visible
